ModMetadata.Name: ScenarioRunner
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description: Developer tooling. Scenario-driven runtime probe for the Stationeers dedicated server. Not a player-facing mod; do not ship.
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: <size="30"><color=#ffa500>ScenarioRunner</color></size> Developer tooling. Not a player-facing mod.
